title: T2 scaffolding project package structure
description: Scaffold planned project directories and files for KWin effect + tray companion after PoC validation: metadata, main.qml stub, main.xml, tray CMake/main.cpp placeholders, resources, autostart desktop, install script, and top-level README/gitignore update.

title: Start plasma-snap-assistant work session
description: Session startup for the selected work plan. Scope: persist boulder state, normalize plan blockers identified in preflight review, decompose the full plan into dependency-aware Beads tasks, and claim the first executable Wave 1 task. Verification: .sisyphus/boulder.json exists with active plan metadata; Beads contains parent + child issues for plan tasks; startup issue notes capture Momus findings and chosen resolutions.
notes: Preflight review applied before implementation: (1) QA wording now requires explicit agent-executable automation for shortcut/click/Escape steps, (2) config ownership clarified so Effect main.xml contains only defaultDensity and shortcutKey while trayIconEnabled stays in tray config, (3) PKGBUILD task now specifies filesystem copy targets instead of invoking kpackagetool6 during package(). Child issues T1-T16 and F1-F4 created with dependency edges matching the work plan.
close_reason: Startup complete: boulder state written, plan blockers normalized, and full Beads dependency graph registered before claiming T1.

title: T1 SceneEffect overlay PoC + activation validation
description: Files: kwin-effect-plasma-snap-assistant/metadata.json, contents/ui/main.qml, contents/config/main.xml. Build a minimal KWin Effect PoC that renders an overlay, validates ShortcutHandler, validates at least one tray-to-effect activation path, and proves window.frameGeometry placement works. Verify with kpackagetool6 install/enable flow, qdbus activation checks, kdotool shortcut/Escape automation, and evidence files under .sisyphus/evidence/task-1-*.
notes:
Local verification environment on this host: kpackagetool6, kwriteconfig6, kreadconfig6, spectacle, journalctl, node, xmllint are available. qdbus is not on PATH, but qdbus6, gdbus, dbus-send, and busctl are available. kdotool is not on PATH; any automated shortcut/pointer steps will need a validated substitute, host install, or a narrowed proof path documented in evidence. cmake is not on PATH at session start, so tray build verification cannot assume it until the environment is adjusted.
Atlas verification rejected current T1 implementation again.  still includes drag-selection, placement, density switching, and , so Task 1 remains incomplete. Runtime validation is also blocked pending live KWin session proof. Moving to independent T3/T4 while T1 remains unresolved.
User explicitly instructed Atlas not to implement additional code. Remaining Task 1 work is therefore blocked pending user reversal of that constraint or a switch to review/revert-only mode. Atlas will continue with audit/verification work but will not delegate new implementation edits.

title: T10 Integrate tray-to-effect activation
description: Files: plasma-snap-assistant-tray/src/, kwin-effect-plasma-snap-assistant/contents/ui/main.qml if needed. Implement the activation path validated by T1, route tray actions through DBus or config-based signaling, and surface KNotification on failure. Verify end-to-end tray activation, failure notification, and coexistence with shortcut activation.

title: T11 Add density switching UI bar
description: Files: kwin-effect-plasma-snap-assistant/contents/ui/DensityBar.qml and main.qml. Add the bottom selector bar with 8x6, 6x4, and 4x4 labels, active-state visuals, click switching, keyboard sync, and selection reset on density change. Verify screenshots and keyboard-driven density changes with correct cell counts.

title: T12 Implement multi-monitor targeting
description: Files: kwin-effect-plasma-snap-assistant/contents/ui/main.qml and any geometry helpers. Target the monitor containing the active window, compute work area per output, cancel on screensChanged, and keep v1 snapping on the current monitor only. Verify overlay placement on the correct monitor, panel-aware work area, and hotplug cancellation behavior.

title: T13 Finalize KConfig schema and defaults
description: Files: kwin-effect-plasma-snap-assistant/contents/config/main.xml and plasma-snap-assistant-tray/config/plasma-snap-assistantrc. Keep Effect config limited to defaultDensity and shortcutKey, keep trayIconEnabled in tray config, and prove kwriteconfig6/kreadconfig6 round-trips. Verify XML validity, config persistence across KWin reconfigure, and absence of .kcfg/.kcfgc files.

title: T14 Harden edge cases and error recovery
description: Files: kwin-effect-plasma-snap-assistant/contents/ui/main.qml and tray code paths as needed. Handle window closure/minimize/fullscreen changes, monitor changes, rapid toggle behavior, missing-effect activation failures, and geometry bounds checks without adding restore or nonessential systems. Verify automated edge-case scenarios and evidence capture for each.

title: T15 Create PKGBUILD and packaging artifacts
description: Files: PKGBUILD, .SRCINFO, Makefile or development install script, .gitignore packaging entries. Package by copying the effect payload into /usr/share/kwin/effects/plasma-snap-assistant/, installing the tray binary, autostart desktop file, and icon assets in the right filesystem locations. Verify makepkg metadata generation and documented package layout rather than invoking kpackagetool6 inside package().
notes: Audit-only review: PKGBUILD/.SRCINFO/Makefile exist locally, but Task 15 is not closable. It is still blocked by unfinished upstream tasks per plan (Tasks 10 and 13), and no clean packaging verification has been performed. No code changes were made because the user prohibited further implementation.

title: T16 Write README, CONTRIBUTING, and LICENSE
description: Files: README.md, CONTRIBUTING.md, LICENSE. Document only v1 scope, installation, manual configuration, usage, architecture, development setup, and GPL-2.0-or-later licensing. Verify docs by replaying installation/config steps from a clean starting point and keeping screenshots as placeholders until implementation exists.
notes: Audit-only review: README/CONTRIBUTING/LICENSE exist locally, but Task 16 is not closable. README currently documents features and activation details ahead of verified implementation truth (multi-cell drag snapping, density bar switching, specific KGlobalAccel tray activation path). No code changes were made because the user prohibited further implementation.

title: F1 Run plan compliance audit
description: Review task after implementation. Read the plan end-to-end, verify every Must Have and Must NOT Have against the actual tree, check evidence files, and emit an approve/reject summary with exact file references for any violations.

title: F2 Run code quality review
description: Review task after implementation. Check QML/JS/C++/metadata for structure, unused imports, hardcoded paths, missing error handling, forbidden config formats, and install cleanliness. Verify metadata.json and contents/config/main.xml correctness.

title: F3 Execute final integration QA
description: Review task after implementation. Start from a clean state, install/build both packages, replay every task QA scenario with automated tooling only, and save final evidence under .sisyphus/evidence/final-qa/. Emit pass/fail counts for scenarios, integration paths, and edge cases.

title: T2 Scaffold project structure and package layout
description: Files: kwin-effect-plasma-snap-assistant/, plasma-snap-assistant-tray/, scripts/install.sh, top-level README placeholder, .gitignore updates if needed. Create the repo layout exactly as planned, keep Effect and tray separate, use contents/config/main.xml rather than .kcfg, and place tray defaults in plasma-snap-assistant-tray/config/plasma-snap-assistantrc. Verify metadata.json JSON validity, main.xml XML validity, no .kcfg/.kcfgc files, and effect package install visibility.
notes:
Blocked in practice because Task 2 depends on Task 1, and user has explicitly paused further code implementation. Atlas may audit existing scaffold state but will not add or modify implementation files until the constraint is lifted.
Audit-only review found Task 2 is not yet compliant as-is: metadata.json lacks the planned X-Plasma-ConfigExtensions reference, main.xml currently carries Task 1 PoC keys instead of the planned scaffold keys, README is far beyond placeholder scope, and tray src/main.cpp already contains implementation logic although Task 2 says scaffolding only. No code changes were made because the user prohibited further implementation.

title: F4 Check scope fidelity against plan
description: Review task after implementation. Compare each task spec to the actual diff, confirm nothing outside v1 scope slipped in, and explicitly reject forbidden additions like KWin Script, QSystemTrayIcon, .kcfg files, restore features, or complex animation systems.

title: T3 Implement zone calculation module
description: Files: kwin-effect-plasma-snap-assistant/contents/js/zoneCalculator.js and tests/zoneCalculator.test.js. Implement pure grid-zone calculation for 8x6, 6x4, and 4x4 densities with integer geometry, exact tiling, portrait handling, and small-workarea coverage. Verify with node tests/zoneCalculator.test.js and explicit dimension checks for planned monitor sizes.
close_reason: Verified by Atlas: zoneCalculator.js is pure calculation-only, no multi-cell selection helper remains, diagnostics are clean, and node tests pass for all required densities and tiling cases.

title: T4 Implement window eligibility filter module
description: Files: kwin-effect-plasma-snap-assistant/contents/js/eligibilityFilter.js and tests/eligibilityFilter.test.js. Implement include/exclude logic for KWin windows, fixed-size detection, and filterEligibleWindows(windows). Verify with mock-window tests covering fullscreen, dock, dialog, utility, toolbar, splash, minimized, fixed-size, and normal windows.
close_reason: Verified by Atlas: eligibilityFilter.js now covers visible/current-desktop inclusion, uses property access only, diagnostics are clean, and node tests pass for inclusion, exclusion, and borderline cases.

title: T5 Render effect grid overlay
description: Files: kwin-effect-plasma-snap-assistant/contents/ui/main.qml plus any extracted QML delegates such as ZoneGrid.qml or CellDelegate.qml. Render the active-monitor overlay, grid lines, hover/selection visuals, and density-aware zones using zoneCalculator output. Verify with effect install/enable flow and screenshot evidence showing correct default density and visible highlights.

title: T6 Add overlay input handling
description: Files: kwin-effect-plasma-snap-assistant/contents/ui/main.qml and any helper QML components. Add exclusive MouseArea/Keys handling for hover, click, drag region selection, Escape cancel, and density hotkeys 1/2/3. Verify with automated kdotool input for hover tracking, click snap trigger, drag selection, Escape cancel, and keyboard density switching.

title: T7 Implement window placement execution
description: Files: kwin-effect-plasma-snap-assistant/contents/ui/main.qml and contents/js/placement.js if split out. Re-check eligibility at placement time, compute target frameGeometry, honor clientArea work area, handle minimum-size fallback, and cancel safely when the target window disappears or changes state. Verify with geometry before/after evidence for single-cell, multi-cell, window-closed, and min-size cases.

title: T8 Wire ShortcutHandler and effect configuration
description: Files: kwin-effect-plasma-snap-assistant/contents/ui/main.qml and contents/config/main.xml. Register the effect shortcut via ShortcutHandler, read defaultDensity and shortcutKey from effect.configuration, toggle the overlay on repeated activation, and no-op for ineligible focus. Verify with automated kdotool shortcut runs, ineligible-window no-op checks, toggle behavior, and config-read evidence.

title: T9 Build tray companion app
description: Files: plasma-snap-assistant-tray/CMakeLists.txt, src/main.cpp, resources/, config/plasma-snap-assistantrc. Build a thin KDE tray companion using KStatusNotifierItem with themed icon, context menu, DBus service registration, and no placement logic. Verify build success, DBus registration at org.kde.plasma_snap_assistant /Tray, activation entry points, quit path, and missing-effect notification behavior.
notes: External tray references collected before implementation: KDE API docs and OSS examples consistently use KStatusNotifierItem with setIconByName(theme-name icon), setToolTip, setContextMenu, setStatus(Active/Passive), and explicit activation handlers. Prefer themed icon names over pixmaps for DBus/theme compatibility. Wayland/KDE path is correct; QSystemTrayIcon remains out of scope.
